overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a vibrant landscape covered in red blight vegetation. The character approaches a massive Tallneck machine structure under a partly cloudy sky with dramatic sunlight and distant mountains visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field with red blight vegetation near golden arch structure

events.description: character transitions from stationary to walking forward
leaving the starting area with golden arch, entering open red blight field

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily away from the starting area through the red blight field

notable_agents.action: NPC in yellow clothing crouching on the ground examining the red vegetation

entered.detail: Large ornate archway made of golden twisted metal or vines marking the starting area
Character crouched near the red vegetation at the path's edge
Ground covered in red root-like blight infection with patches of green grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy standing near a golden arch structure in a field covered with red blight vegetation. A crouching NPC examines the ground nearby. As Aloy begins walking forward, the camera follows in third-person perspective, leaving the starting area and entering the open field where distant mountains and mechanical structures become visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: red blight field with distant mountains and mechanical structures

events.description: massive Tallneck machine structure becomes clearly visible on the horizon
sun position creates warm golden hour lighting and approaching lens flare

agents.ego_description: Aloy continuing through the red field toward the massive Tallneck machine in the distance

entered.detail: Massive saucer-shaped mechanical walker with long legs towering over the landscape
Large tilted satellite dish or radar array structure
Red rocky mountain cliffs with mist in the background

segments.scene_description: Aloy traverses the open red blight field as the massive Tallneck machine becomes visible in the distance. The satellite dish structure stands prominently on the right while red mountains rise in the background. The lighting shifts to a warmer golden tone as the sun begins to create lens flares, and the Tallneck grows larger in the frame as Aloy approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching Tallneck base with small tribal settlement

events.description: strong sun flare appears from the left side creating dramatic backlighting
approaching small tribal hut with NPCs near the base of the Tallneck

agents.ego_description: Aloy approaching the base of the Tallneck, passing by a small wooden hut with other characters nearby

notable_agents.action: Two NPCs standing near a small wooden hut observing the Tallneck

entered.detail: Small wooden structure with thatched roof and fabric coverings
Tall red vegetation flanking both sides of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The final segment features dramatic backlighting from a strong sun flare on the left as Aloy approaches the base of the Tallneck machine. The camera passes a small tribal hut on the right where two NPCs stand observing the area. The Tallneck now dominates the left side of the frame at close range, while the path continues through tall red blight vegetation toward the massive mechanical structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a field of red blight vegetation that gradually opens up to reveal the towering scale of a mechanical Tallneck. It begins with Aloy standing near a golden arch structure beside a crouching NPC before she walks forward into an open expanse where distant mountains and structures emerge on the horizon. As she traverses the red field, the lighting shifts to a warmer golden tone with emerging lens flares, and the massive Tallneck grows increasingly prominent against a backdrop of red mountains and a satellite dish. The scene then shifts toward the base of the machine, passing a small tribal hut and observing NPCs as a strong sun flare creates dramatic backlighting from the left. Finally, the camera follows Aloy through tall red vegetation as the colossal mechanical structure comes to dominate the frame at close range.
